modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use an even and factual tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be no spelling errors and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Inkjet printer only prints in color and lacks clarity.

full_description_text: The user reported that their inkjet printer is only producing color prints, despite having replaced all the ink cartridges. Additionally, the prints are not coming out clearly. This issue was discussed during a live phone call with the help desk analyst.
short_description: Inkjet printer only prints in color and lacks clarity.
description: The user reported that their inkjet printer is only producing color prints, despite having replaced all the ink cartridges. Additionally, the prints are not coming out clearly. This issue was discussed during a live phone call with the help desk analyst.
